text:
Synopsis

From the back of the volume:
"Ed and Al come face to face with the "father" of the homunculi, who just so happens to be a dead ringer of their own father, Van Hohenheim-a resemblance too uncanny for coincidence. And when the allure of immortality proves to be too much for Prince Ling of Xing, he lets Greed take over...literally!"
